hypothesis: If the MatAgent framework with LLM-driven planning, external tool usage, diffusion-based crystal-structure generation, and iComFormer evaluation yields candidate inorganic materials with formation energies within ±0.25 eV/atom of predefined targets at a higher success rate across 20 independent runs than tool-free LLM variants and MatterGen, then tool-assisted iterative materials discovery more effectively achieves targeted formation energies.
